name: NexGuild
description: A full-stack, two-sided micro-work platform connecting contributors who complete tasks and surveys with organisations that need human-powered data work — AI data collection, annotation, moderation, and QA. Contributors earn NexCoins and redeem them for real gift vouchers.
highlights: Granular, multi-tier role-based access control across the whole platform
A complete internal currency system with automated, real-time payout logic
Live third-party survey and offerwall integrations with verified, fraud-resistant callbacks
Multiple independent ways to verify completed work, mixed and matched per task
Gamification layer: XP, levels, streaks, and a contributor leaderboard
A referral program paying ongoing commission on referred contributors' earnings
A full internal admin system covering 74+ routes, zero build errors
17 SEO blog posts, Google Analytics 4 and Search Console verified
Cloud storage integration for file-based task submissions
Bot protection and transactional email on every user-facing flow
whatWasBuilt: Designed and shipped the entire platform solo: the data model and access-control policies, an internal currency and payout engine, several fraud-resistant task-verification pipelines, two live third-party integrations, a full role-based admin system, and the complete contributor dashboard — architected and shipped end-to-end.

name: xtoolkit.live
tagline: Free online tools platform — 44 tools, zero paywall
description: A free online tool factory with 44 tools across developer utilities, SEO, X/Twitter, email/privacy, AI writing, and text formatting. No signup, no paywall, no data stored — tools run in the browser or process-and-discard server-side.
highlights: 44 tools across 6 categories — 21 of them developer utilities alone
A live email-account verification tool built without relying on any third-party API
AI Bio Generator and AI Text Detector powered by real LLM inference with automatic failover
Chrome Extension published on the Chrome Web Store, 5-star rating, with a background auto-refresh service
A rendering layer that makes the tool directory fully crawlable for search engines
A hardened API security stack — rate limiting, input sanitization, and injection protection on every route
24 SEO blog articles across 4 topic clusters, traffic from 40+ countries
A typed, spec-driven API layer keeping the frontend and backend in lockstep as tools were added
whatWasBuilt: Built the full platform solo: a fast, tool-rich frontend covering 44 utilities, a hardened backend API, a published Chrome extension, a typed API contract keeping both in sync, and a complete SEO layer on top of what would otherwise be an unindexable client-rendered app.

name: StarScoopDaily
description: A celebrity and entertainment news site with a fully automated AI article-generation pipeline, publishing 1,200+ word articles daily with zero manual writing.
highlights: Automated AI article-generation pipeline producing 1,200+ word articles from live headline feeds
A custom publishing system engineered around real production hosting constraints
Full 6-tab admin panel: news fetcher, article generator, ads manager, site controls, stats, published articles
14 content categories with per-category color theming
Dynamic OG image generation for every article
Monetized via Adsterra display advertising
Google Analytics 4 active from launch
whatWasBuilt: Built the automated content pipeline end-to-end: headline ingestion and scoring, AI-driven article generation, an image-sourcing layer, and a custom publishing flow engineered to work reliably within the constraints of modern serverless hosting.
